title: AVIR
bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingEnhanced Control4 Smart HomePosted on June 26, 2024Enhanced Control4 Smart Home OS 3.3.0‍Color Outside the LinesControl4 has introduced exciting new features that enhance your smart home experience.Set the Mood, Control the AmbianceWith the new built-in color control for LED lighting in OS 3.3.0, you can now illuminate your home with a full spectrum of colors. The innovative color wheel feature lets you create and save favorite color presets for instant enjoyment, providing whole-home ambiance control.‍‍Better, Faster, and SoonerWe understand that time is precious, so we’ve improved the speed of remote connections. With the latest update, the Control4 App for iOS and Android now offers faster remote access, making it as quick as if you were right there at home.Favorites at Your FingertipsYour home at your fingertips — literally. The Control4 App now supports the Apple Watch, providing easy access to your selected Favorites. Control your home conveniently from your wrist and enjoy the seamless integration of technology into your daily routine.How Do I?Navigating new features can be daunting, but Control4 has you covered. We’ve released a series of quick, informative videos showing you how to interact with and customize your smart home. From uploading custom backgrounds to favoriting devices and sharing media, these videos will help you use your system like a pro. Watch and learn from the multi-part series here.‍EVERY INTERACTION IS BETTERExperience Unparalleled ControlControl4 OS 3 offers over a thousand new features and interaction enhancements, thoughtfully redesigned to simplify your smart home experience. Whether you’re using the Halo Touch, Halo Remote, in-wall or tabletop touchscreens, or the Control4 OS app on your phone, you’ll enjoy unparalleled control.‍‍More Personalized Than Ever BeforeMake your smart home uniquely yours with OS 3’s unmatched personalization capabilities. Mark frequently used rooms as favorites, customize wallpapers, and add your most-used devices and media to the main “room view” for quick access.‍Simplicity at Its FinestThe intuitive OS 3 interface provides easy access and control for all devices across your home. Enjoy at-a-glance views of your entire home, allowing you to see the status of your security system, smart door locks, shades, and lights all on a single screen.‍‍Add Favorites for Your ConvenienceFavorites let you personalize your smart home experience. Easily arrange, remove, and favorite your most-used devices, media, and scenes for quick access on your phone, touchscreen, or Neeo remote.‍Wallpapers to ComplementChoose from curated wallpapers designed by top interior designers or upload your own photos to personalize the look of your control interfaces across phones, tablets, touch screens, and TV screens.‍‍Reimagined Entertainment ExperienceOS 3 icons visually represent the status of connected devices, allowing you to instantly see whether a door is locked, a fan is on, or the garage is open. The Comfort screen provides weather details and lets you adjust the temperature with a single tap. The Active Media Bar shows what’s playing around the house, giving you clear and quick control of your home entertainment.‍Providing You the Best Experience from Any Interface You UseWhether you're using a mobile device, a Control4 touchscreen, or a handheld remote, the OS 3 interface is designed to be fast, intuitive, and user-friendly.‍BenefitsUnmatched Personalization and ControlThe updates in Control4 OS 3.3.0 bring a new level of personalization to your smart home. The built-in color control for LED lighting allows you to set the perfect ambiance with ease. The faster remote connections ensure that you can manage your home efficiently, no matter where you are. The support for Apple Watch provides unparalleled convenience, putting control of your home right on your wrist.‍Enhanced User ExperienceControl4 OS 3 offers an intuitive interface with over a thousand new features designed to simplify your smart home experience. The ability to favorite rooms and devices, customize wallpapers, and manage your home with a single touch makes everyday interactions seamless and enjoyable.‍Comprehensive Control at Your FingertipsWhether you’re at home or on the go, the Control4 system ensures that you have comprehensive control over all your smart devices. The updated app and interfaces provide clear, quick access to your home’s systems, enhancing security, comfort, and entertainment.By implementing these updates, Control4 continues to offer a robust, user-friendly smart home experience, keeping you connected and in control like never before.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍FAQs about Control4 OS 3.3.0What is Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍Control4 OS 3.3.0 is the latest update to the Control4 Smart Home operating system, offering enhanced features and improved functionality for a better smart home experience.‍What new features are included in Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍The new features include built-in color control for LED lighting, faster remote connections, Apple Watch support, and an intuitive interface with over a thousand new enhancements.‍How do I control LED lighting with Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍Control4 OS 3.3.0 introduces a color wheel feature that allows you to create and save favorite color presets for your LED lighting, enabling whole-home ambiance control.‍Can I use the Control4 App on my Apple Watch?‍Yes, the Control4 App now supports the Apple Watch, allowing you to control your smart home directly from your wrist.‍How do I access faster remote connections with Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍The latest update improves the speed of remote connections on the Control4 App for iOS and Android, making it as quick as if you were at home.‍What personalization options are available in Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍You can mark frequently used rooms as favorites, customize wallpapers, and add your most-used devices and media to the main “room view” for quick access.‍How can I get help with new features in Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍Control4 offers a series of quick, informative videos and Customer Assistance buttons on touchscreens and apps to help you navigate and customize your smart home.‍What devices can I control with Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍You can control a variety of smart home devices, including security systems, smart door locks, shades, lights, and entertainment systems, all from a single interface.‍How do I update to Control4 OS 3.3.0?‍To experience the full capabilities of Control4 OS 3.3.0, contact your Control4 Smart Home Pro to schedule your update.‍What makes Control4 OS 3.3.0 user-friendly?‍The OS 3.3.0 interface is designed to be fast, intuitive, and user-friendly, providing clear and quick access to your home’s systems whether you're using a mobile device, touchscreen, or handheld remote.‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA
